body:
Zarr ≥0.10.1's uncompressed single-chunk fastpath hands the store a multidimensional `reinterpret(UInt8, chunk)`, which a `Vector{UInt8}`-backed store (`DictStore`, S3) can't accept, so the default `NoCompressor` throws a `MethodError` (hit by `test_zarr_writer.jl` "[alternative stores]"). Default those stores to a compressor; `DirectoryStore` keeps `NoCompressor`.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

labels.description: Even a perfect program still has bugs
labels.name: bug 🐞

title: Fix ZarrWriter test

body: This PR modifies `Adapt.adapt_strucuture(::RectilinearGrid)` to include Lx, Ly, and Lz, making it more like other adapt_structure calls such as for `LatitudeLongitudeGrid`. It fixes issue #5768
title: Add Lx, Ly, Lz to adapt calls in `Adapt.adapt_structure(::RectilinearGrid)`
